feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: gopls-lsp
entry.content: Go language server for code intelligence and refactoring

entry.title: explanatory-output-style
entry.content: Adds educational insights about implementation choices and codebase patterns (mimics the deprecated Explanatory output style)

entry.title: aave-v3-plugin
entry.content: Lend and borrow crypto assets on Aave V3 — the leading decentralized liquidity protocol. Trigger phrases: supply to aave, deposit to aave, borrow from aave, repay aave loan, aave health factor, my aave positions, aave interest rates, enable emode, disable collateral, claim aave rewards.

entry.title: dotnet-test-migration
entry.content: Skills and an orchestrator agent for migrating .NET test frameworks and platforms: MSTest and xUnit version upgrades, xUnit-to-MSTest conversion, and VSTest to Microsoft.Testing.Platform.

entry.content: Claude Agent SDK Development Plugin

entry.content: ASP.NET Core web development skills including middleware, endpoints, real-time communication, and API patterns.

entry.content: Comprehensive MSBuild and .NET build skills: failure diagnosis, performance optimization, code quality, and modernization.

entry.content: Analyze codebases and recommend tailored Claude Code automations such as hooks, skills, MCP servers, and subagents.

entry.title: dotnet
entry.content: Collection of core .NET skills for handling common .NET coding tasks.

entry.title: github
entry.content: Official GitHub MCP server for repository management. Create issues, manage pull requests, review code, search repositories, and interact with GitHub's full API directly from Claude Code.

entry.title: file-organizer
entry.content: Intelligently organizes files and folders by understanding context, finding duplicates, and suggesting better organizational structures.

entry.title: dotnet-maui
entry.content: Skills for .NET MAUI development: environment setup, diagnostics, troubleshooting, navigation, data binding, dependency injection, layout, and theming.

entry.title: supabase
entry.content: Supabase MCP integration for database operations, authentication, storage, and real-time subscriptions. Manage your Supabase projects, run SQL queries, and interact with your backend directly.

entry.title: raffle-winner-picker
entry.content: Randomly selects winners from lists, spreadsheets, or Google Sheets for giveaways and contests with cryptographically secure randomness.

entry.content: Frontend design skill for UI/UX implementation

entry.title: code-review
entry.content: Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring

entry.title: playground
entry.content: Creates interactive HTML playgrounds — self-contained single-file explorers with visual controls, live preview, and prompt output with copy button

entry.title: project-design
entry.content: Assembles complete planning packages for software projects: product design documents in Phase A, engineering handbook and CI/CD plan in Phase B, and ongoing revisions in Phase C.

entry.title: code-simplifier
entry.content: Agent that simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving functionality

entry.content: Adds educational insights about implementation choices and codebase patterns (mimics the deprecated Explanatory output style)

entry.title: invoice-organizer

entry.content: Skills for working with PowerPoint presentations including creation, editing, and formatting using PPTX format.

entry.title: ralph-loop
entry.content: Continuous self-referential AI loops for interactive iterative development, implementing the Ralph Wiggum technique. Run Claude in a while-true loop with the same prompt until task completion.

entry.title: template-skill
entry.content: A template skill that demonstrates the structure and format for creating new Claude Skills.

entry.title: security-guidance
entry.content: Security reminder hook that warns about potential security issues when editing files, including command injection, XSS, and unsafe code patterns

entry.title: greptile
entry.content: AI code review agent for GitHub and GitLab. View and resolve Greptile's PR review comments directly from Claude Code.

entry.title: learning-output-style
entry.content: Interactive learning mode that requests meaningful code contributions at decision points (mimics the unshipped Learning output style)

entry.title: plugin-dev
entry.content: Comprehensive toolkit for developing Claude Code plugins. Includes 7 expert skills covering hooks, MCP integration, commands, agents, and best practices. AI-assisted plugin creation and validation.

entry.title: eou-foundry
entry.content: Recursive governance for Executable Operating Units (EOUs). Faceted classification, generating-EOU constraints, ECP-governed change, no-self-approval. Install in any project that needs to turn messy workflows into auditable, retirable operating units.

entry.title: ros2-humble-env
entry.content: ROS2 Humble development environment with ARIA orchestrator commands

entry.title: tap
entry.content: Multi-session orchestration — parallel worktrees, file-based comms, generational knowledge transfer

entry.title: designlang
entry.content: Extract any website's design language and ship it. Five slash commands — /extract, /grade, /battle, /remix, /pack — wrap the designlang CLI to pull DTCG tokens, Tailwind/shadcn/Figma vars, motion + voice, generate shareable graded report cards, head-to-head battle pages, six-vocabulary remixes, and full downloadable design-system bundles.

entry.title: kitcn
entry.content: kitcn development skill

entry.title: caveman
entry.content: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts ~75% of tokens while keeping full technical accuracy by speaking like a caveman.

entry.title: context-bazaar
entry.content: A typed, discoverable knowledge bazaar for AI coding harness configurations with Solr-backed semantic search — skills, powers, workflows, prompts, and agents for Kiro, Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, and more.

entry.content: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Chrome using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer

entry.title: actionbook
entry.content: Actionbook MCP server for up-to-date browser automation. Get verified CSS/XPath selectors for any website directly into your agent context.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: datarobot-agent-skills
entry.content: DataRobot skills for AI/ML workflows — model training, deployment, predictions, feature engineering, monitoring, explainability, data preparation, App Framework CI/CD, and external agent monitoring.

entry.title: dash0-agent-plugin
entry.content: OpenTelemetry observability for Claude Code sessions. Captures tool calls, LLM invocations, token usage, and errors as OTel traces.

entry.title: crowdstrike-falcon-foundry
entry.content: CrowdStrike Falcon Foundry development skills for building cybersecurity applications on the Falcon platform. Includes UI development, collections, functions, workflows, API integration, security patterns, and debugging workflows. Swagger 2.0 specs are auto-converted to OpenAPI 3.0 via npx swagger2openapi (requires Node.js; network call to npm registry).

entry.title: sap-fiori-mcp-server
entry.content: MCP server for SAP Fiori development tools for Claude Code. Build and modify SAP Fiori applications with AI assistance.

entry.title: humanizer
entry.content: Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text

entry.title: audit-suite
entry.content: 16 skills: 10 expert audit lenses + full-audit orchestrator + 5 bundled reference skills. Review plans and code through the eyes of Design, UX, Frontend, Backend, Structural, Repo, Production, DX, Performance, and Accessibility engineers. Includes emil-design-engineering, vercel-react-best-practices, web-animation-design, web-design-guidelines, and make-interfaces-feel-better — zero external dependencies.

entry.title: ponytail
entry.content: Lazy senior dev mode. Forces the simplest, shortest solution that actually works: YAGNI, stdlib first, no unrequested abstractions.

entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: sonarqube
entry.content: SonarQube is the AI code quality and security verification platform used by millions of developers to catch bugs, vulnerabilities, and leaked secrets. This plugin enforces those standards in the agent coding loop: 7,500+ distinct issue types, secrets scanning, agentic analysis, and quality gates across 40+ languages.

entry.content: AI-powered wiki generator for code repositories. Generates comprehensive, Mermaid-rich documentation with dark-mode VitePress sites, onboarding guides, deep research, and source citations. Inspired by OpenDeepWiki and deepwiki-open.

entry.content: Azure SDK patterns and best practices for TypeScript/Node.js developers covering AI, storage, identity, monitoring, and messaging libraries.

entry.title: sentry
entry.content: Sentry Plugin for Claude Code to help with debugging including MCP, commands, and skill capabilities.

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Battle-tested Claude Code plugin for engineering teams — 58 agents, 217 skills, 74 legacy command shims, production-ready hooks, and selective install workflows evolved through continuous real-world use

entry.title: claude-obsidian
entry.content: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Sets up a persistent, compounding wiki vault. Covers memory management, session notetaking, knowledge organization, and agent context across projects. Based on Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

entry.title: clasp
entry.content: Develop Apps Script projects locally using clasp

entry.title: jstack
entry.content: jstack — a layered learn→plan→execute loop over 9 phases. Step 0 plans the task into a dependency-ordered checklist + a # LAYERS list; each layer walks all nine phases then advances to the next (frontend→…→deploy), only the last firing the ship promise. A semantic node-cache keys each node by a normalized token-set signature of its goal, so when a goal matches one settled on a prior walk the loop surfaces the prior result for reuse (skip) and fans out independent nodes in parallel. Mandatory podman containment: ship gates and witnesses run inside a memory-capped envelope (no host fallback). Contract-native: /contract substrate (aiko), default ship_gate, post-ship seal. In-place, multi-session, per-step grader, fib-harness adversarial pass on the verdict phase. Three harness adapters: Claude Code, Codex CLI, opencode.

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: Composable agent skills for real engineering work — grilling, triage, TDD, PRDs, and productivity rituals from Matt Pocock.

entry.title: claude-obsidian
entry.content: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Sets up a persistent, compounding wiki vault. Covers memory management, session notetaking, knowledge organization, and agent context across projects. Based on Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern. Optional DragonScale Memory extension adds hierarchical log folds, deterministic page addresses, embedding-based semantic tiling lint, and boundary-first autoresearch topic selection.

entry.title: claude-seo
entry.content: Comprehensive SEO analysis skill for Claude Code. 20 core sub-skills covering technical SEO, content quality (E-E-A-T), schema markup, image optimization, sitemap architecture, AI search optimization (GEO), local SEO, maps intelligence, semantic topic clustering, search experience optimization (SXO), SEO drift monitoring, e-commerce SEO, international SEO with cultural profiles, and strategic planning across all industries.

entry.title: claude-github-tools
entry.content: GitHub workflow skills for Claude Code - issue creation, PR review triage, backlog summaries/quick-wins, and GitHub Actions authoring.

entry.title: xlsx
entry.content: Comprehensive spreadsheet creation, editing, and analysis with support for formulas, formatting, data analysis, and visualization. When Claude needs to work with spreadsheets (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, .tsv, etc) for: (1) Creating new spreadsheets with formulas and formatting, (2) Reading or analyzing data, (3) Modify existing spreadsheets while preserving formulas, (4) Data analysis and visualization in spreadsheets, or (5) Recalculating formulas

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, commands, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: spacedock
entry.content: Turn directories of markdown files into structured workflows operated by AI agents

entry.title: figma
entry.content: Plugin that includes the Figma MCP server and Skills for common workflows

entry.title: metaspace-membrane
entry.content: Deny-by-default agent membrane: a PreToolUse hook that keeps the coding agent inside a hardened .bio constitution (project-only writes, network host allowlist, dangerous-command block).

entry.title: cwd-safety
entry.content: Keeps the agent's Bash working directory at project root. A PreToolUse(Bash) hook blocks drift-inducing `cd` commands and any command run from a drifted cwd; a PostToolUse(Bash) hook warns when the working directory has changed.

entry.title: onekeys
entry.content: Expand single-character Claude Code prompts into full instructions via a UserPromptSubmit hook. Type c for Continue, h for /handoff:handoff, etc.; mappings live in ~/.claude/onekeyers.txt.

entry.title: docx
entry.content: Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, formatting preservation, and text extraction. When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks

entry.title: typo3-site-conformance
entry.content: Source-of-truth conformance ruleset + self-contained checker for deployable TYPO3 v14 site/project repos (type:project + Docker/Compose): layout, containers, Concourse CI, supply-chain, secrets, Valkey/ofelia. The site/project counterpart to typo3-conformance.

entry.title: observent
entry.content: Production-grade observability for multi-agent Python apps. Detects your framework (LangGraph, CrewAI, Microsoft Agent Framework, Anthropic Agents SDK, OpenAI Agents SDK, smolagents, LlamaIndex, Google ADK, or a Custom no-framework path) and wires up Arize Phoenix, Langfuse, SigNoz, Elastic APM, LangSmith, Opik, or Jaeger with correct span hierarchy, context propagation, and mandatory OTel/OpenInference attributes.

entry.title: pdf
entry.content: Comprehensive PDF manipulation toolkit for extracting text and tables, creating new PDFs, merging/splitting documents, and handling forms. When Claude needs to fill in a PDF form or programmatically process, generate, or analyze PDF documents at scale.

entry.title: candidature
entry.content: Candidature assistée : préparation, lettre de motivation, CV adapté, relecture, suivi des retours. Stockage en fichiers locaux. Contenu français.

entry.title: shell-scripting
entry.content: Shell scripting gotchas skill plus automatic shellcheck feedback on edited shell files

entry.title: jujutsu-workflow
entry.content: Agent-safe version control with Jujutsu (jj): jj as the local change layer, Git as the canonical remote/PR/CI/audit interface

entry.title: pptx
entry.content: Presentation creation, editing, and analysis. When Claude needs to work with presentations (.pptx files) for: (1) Creating new presentations, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with layouts, (4) Adding comments or speaker notes, or any other presentation tasks

entry.title: edmunds-claude-code
entry.content: Edmund's personal Claude Code setup with 14 productivity commands and 11 specialized AI agents for modern web development

entry.title: ultracost
entry.content: Quality-first per-stage model routing for Claude Code dynamic workflows (ultracode): a SessionStart hook that injects the routing policy, a PreToolUse cost gate, a routing skill, and slash commands for the whole workflow — /ultracost:check (guard agent() stages), estimate, explain, simulate, diff, audit, usage, reconcile, calibrate, ledger, status.

entry.title: fns-build-factory
entry.content: FNS Build Factory — a complete client-acquisition build system: websites (Site Factory), funnels (Funnel Builder), cold email (Email Sequence Writer), GHL automation (GHL Workflow Generator), and full apps (Build Factory). Wired to the Parts Factory component MCP.

entry.title: codex-orchestrator
entry.content: Orchestrate OpenAI Codex from Claude: delegate implementation work in supervised checkpoint slices with server-enforced quality gates, persistent plans/hypotheses, worktree isolation and per-task model/effort control.

entry.title: backlogd
entry.content: Turn Claude Code into a problem-driven scrum team: file problems in Linear, let agents own the solutions.

entry.content: GPT Image 2 skill — generate, edit, compose images via OpenAI-compatible API. Originally from jiangmuran/claude-image, maintained with fixes by MuseLinn

entry.content: Forces `git status` to run with the Claude Code command sandbox disabled, so it reports the real working tree instead of phantom sandbox-mount entries.

entry.title: ultraship

Elite SEO strategy with AI traffic tracking, IndexNow, GSC-GA4 cross-reference, CTR anomalies, brand filtering, keyword intelligence, index doctor, codebase index, pentest, ship, launch, grow, rescue.

entry.content: Spec-driven development workflow plugins for Claude Code.

entry.content: Claude Code efficiency and hygiene toolkit. Surfaces token spend across the 5h / 7d / Sonnet-7d billing windows with per-model / per-agent / per-skill attribution, and audits your effective Claude Code configuration (custom + plugin agents and skills) for overlap and conflicts. Ships an interactive dashboard, a conversational usage-analysis skill, and a structured config-audit skill.

entry.content: Skill for creating conventional-style git commits grouped by component when managing dotfiles and configuration changes.
